title: Netherite Buckets
description: It changes the buckets to look like they are made of Netherite.
body:
![Cover](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce62f7b19715c954f6753e8c4a3022ba81c73cdf.png)


<details>
<summary>Examples:</summary>

![FluidBuckets](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a557f4efb0dc5ab1186174494182093f6912c60a.png)![FishBuckets](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ecf648b73a010aa62d03efb751cdccbf3d0bbd36.png)
</details>

**Description:**

This is a simple resource pack that changes the appearance of buckets to make them look like they are made of Netherite.


<details>
<summary>You can also find this Pack on:</summary>

・[Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/netherite-buckets-6180236/)
